\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}

\(s[\\phi]=\\int_{m}\\mathcal{l}_{\\mathrm{t}}(\\phi,\\nabla^{\\mathrm{t}}\\phi,g)\\,\\mathrm{d}^n x\\)
